headlines.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran hasn't made a deal because ‘they’re strong’ and ‘proud’
headlines.description: President Trump sits down for an exclusive interview with Meet the Press as the U.S. looks to make a deal with Iran to end the war.

headlines.title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon is increasingly concerned about Israel ramping up its spying on the U.S., recently raising the counterintelligence threat level from America’s top ally in the Middle East to the highest level, according to two U.S. officials and one former U.S. official

headlines.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances to California governor general election, NBC News projects
headlines.description: Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Beccera will advance to the general election in the race for governor in California, NBC News projects. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz discuss the latest election results and what impacts the speed of vote counting in the state.

headlines.title: ‘Maine had my back’: Graham Platner hits the campaign trail amid latest turmoil
headlines.description: Hundreds of supporters signaled they weren’t phased by the new allegations about Graham Platner’s past relationships, giving the Democratic Senate candidate a warm welcome on Friday.

headlines.title: Former NYPD detectives speak out about Luigi Mangione manhunt for first time
headlines.description: Two former NYPD detectives speak exclusively with Lester Holt about those frantic days after the murder of the United Healthcare CEO in broad daylight in Midtown Manhattan. They describe how they ultimately identified him in a Dateline NBC special airing tonight.

headlines.title: A ‘60 Minutes’ veteran gets fired, and a rookie hits an unusual home run: The news quiz
headlines.description: The House issues a rare rebuke of the president, FIFA imposes a ban, and a flesh-eating parasite returns.

headlines.title: Utah residents sue officials over Kevin O’Leary data center plan
headlines.description: A nonprofit and five Utah residents have filed a lawsuit against officials and a special entity overseeing Kevin O’Leary’s planned Stratos data center.

headlines.title: How the FBI and law enforcement plan to deploy drones to keep FIFA World Cup games safe
headlines.description: The FBI prepares to tackle drone security ahead of FIFA World Cup games spanning across the country. NBC News' Kelly O’Donnell goes behind the scenes with the FBI to see how its own drones and partnerships with local law enforcement will keep the events safe.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Sebastian Berhalter turned his father’s tough truth into World Cup breakthrough
headlines.description: Sebastian Berhalter’s path to the World Cup is not that of a young prodigy who had an easy way onto the U.S. men’s national team — despite what some might think of the son of storied former player and head coach Gregg Berhalter

headlines.title: Mamdani makes ‘high-risk, high-reward’ move to reshape New York’s voice in Washington
headlines.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani is seeking to put his stamp on the city’s congressional delegation with a trio of endorsements against incumbent lawmakers and their picks, a move that could further expand the power of his democratic socialist movement or thwart its progress — and dent his own image in the process.“This is high-risk, high reward,” said Rebecca Katz, the prominent Democratic strategist and ally whose firm worked with Mamdani during his 2025 run.

headlines.title: A ‘60 Minutes’ veteran gets fired, and a rookie hits an unusual home run: The news quiz
headlines.description: The House issues a rare rebuke of the president, FIFA imposes a ban, and a flesh-eating parasite returns.
